notes: GRPO fine-tune of Qwen3-4B-Thinking-2507 on path-C strict 70-prompt curriculum. Adapter from checkpoint-56 (step 56/70 of 17-update epoch, run aborted at 80% by Drive-full bug). Merged fp16 model pushed to TrevorDuong/qwen3-4b-thinking-grpo-strict70. Inference settings match exp_004 baseline (T=0.6, max_tokens=8192, vLLM max_model_len=10240) for apples-to-apples comparison.
